name: Tbilservice waste collection, bin, and fleet telemetry
executiveSummary: Tbilservice's official site publishes service descriptions and news, but no public feed was found for collection routes, vehicle positions, bin fullness, missed collections, or operational status. External case-study reporting says some sensor data exists internally, not publicly.
updateCadence: Public news only; operational telemetry cadence unavailable
accessSummary: Official public site only; no operational data endpoint found.
license: Not applicable to unavailable telemetry; public-site reuse unclear
caveats: Reported internal ultrasonic/GSM container monitoring is not public access evidence

name: Tbilisi Energy gas interruption data
executiveSummary: No public official machine-readable gas-interruption list, map, or API was found. The official site returned CloudFront 403 to command-line validation, and the customer portal is authenticated/private.
accessSummary: Official site access was blocked to command-line validation; no public outage endpoint found. my.te.ge is private/account-specific.

accessPoints.label: Official site
accessPoints.authentication: Public site, but CloudFront returned 403 to test

accessPoints.label: Customer portal
accessPoints.notes: Out of scope for public civic data

caveats: Hotlines are contact channels, not datasets
Republished media notices have incomplete provenance/coverage
reliability: Official avenues and access boundary checked

name: Tbilisi ISP outage/status feeds
executiveSummary: No official public citywide outage/status feed was found for Magti or Silknet. Account self-service pages are private, and the communications regulator's user speed-test service is not an outage feed.
provider: Magti, Silknet, and communications-sector public services
accessSummary: No public official status API/map found; account portals are private.
caveats: Private customer portals are out of scope
sheamotsme.ge is a user speed test, not outage status

name: Georgia 112 live incident and dispatch data
executiveSummary: No public live incident map or record feed was found. Official pages publish educational material, news, and historical/event-specific aggregate statistics, while caller and dispatch records are sensitive operational data.
accessSummary: Public information website only; no incident-level public API/map. Private service endpoints were not probed.
license: Not applicable to unavailable incident records
caveats: Aggregate annual reports are historical and a different dataset class
privacy: Do not seek or expose caller identities, phone numbers, precise private addresses, or active dispatch details

name: Gatishvebi.ge crowdsourced utility outage reports
executiveSummary: A third-party UI for user-submitted electricity, water, gas, and internet outage reports. Its client code exposed an apparent Supabase reports shape, but the referenced backend host failed DNS resolution and no current record was retrieved.
accessSummary: Public UI and client code inspected; referenced backend failed DNS resolution. No credentials or private routes used.
license: Unclear; user-submitted content and backend reuse terms not established
recordCount: UI showed 0 at validation; backend was unavailable, so this is not a verified count

schemas.name: Apparent reports table
schemas.description: Fields referenced by public client insert/select code; no returned row was observed.

caveats: Third-party and crowdsourced, not official status
Fields inferred from client code rather than returned records
Free text may be unverified or personal
reliability: Public UI and client data-access code were inspected
Failure mode was recorded rather than fabricating a sample
privacy: Treat exact user-entered locations and free text cautiously; do not infer household identity
